status.goal: Full song 2–3 min for streaming; 45–90s excerpt for vertical edit
status.targetDuration: 2–3 minutes (full, operator-tuned); excerpt for short video

fields.title: Ruby Swirl Freeze
fields.styleOfMusic: Dreamy K-pop electronic pop with soft four-on-the-floor kick, plush synth bass, and glittery bell arpeggios; verses stay intimate with close-mic breathy vocals and tactile percussive taps (wood stick tap, soft whisk tick), pre-chorus lifts with stacked harmonies and a rising filtered sweep, chorus blooms bright and creamy with gang vocals and a sticky-sweet hook about frost, pink streaks, and summer chill. Add reversed vocal chops, ice-glass sparkle FX, and a tiny glitch fill before each drop. Mix is wide, glossy, and airy with warm low end and crisp transients., k-pop, pop, electronic
fields.excludeStyles: Heavy metal, screamo, trap hi-hat rolls, country twang, lo-fi tape hiss, spoken-word tutorial, children choir novelty, dark industrial, reggae offbeat guitar, bossa lounge only
fields.autoLyricsPrompt:
Write original English song lyrics for a playful summer dessert pop track inspired by roasted strawberry and coconut cream popsicles. Turn the recipe into singable images only: jammy ruby berries, maple gloss, silky white swirls, wooden stick press, frost crystals, and a satisfied kitchen glow. No quantities, no numbered steps, no cooking instructions.

Lyric style: short lines, vivid texture words, gentle rhyme, hopeful and cozy; keep the chorus reusable for a 45-90 second video edit.

Structure:
[Verse 1] — hot berry glow, juice bead, oven hush
[Pre-Chorus] — steam and syrup shine, anticipation chill
[Chorus] — ruby swirl freeze, pink-white streak dream, hold the stick, summer blink
[Verse 2] — chunky pink pulse, cream ribbon fall, mold marble light
[Pre-Chorus] — frost whisper, kitchen heartbeat
[Chorus] — repeat hook with one new image word
[Bridge] — contrast warm roast memory vs cold crisp pop (no tutorial wording)
[Final Chorus] — biggest hook, gang vocals, handclap texture
[Outro Tag] — one soft hum and sparkle fade
fields.shortVersionPlan: Target 55-75s vertical excerpt aligned to Seedance beats: open on [Verse 1] first two lines over roast hook (segment-01), cut to [Pre-Chorus] during jammy payoff (segment-02), drop [Chorus] on first layering spoon (segment-04), ride chorus through freeze/release macro (segment-05), final chorus hook under motionless hero trio (segment-06) before Licorn outro (no Suno under outro). Fade music 0.5s before outro sync. Prefer: 0-12s verse, 12-22s pre-chorus, 22-52s chorus loop, 52-68s final chorus tag.

instructions.voice: Bright young adult female lead, airy and intimate; optional light male harmony in chorus only. Keep consonants soft on frost/stick/plop words.
instructions.structure: Chorus must include the phrase ruby swirl freeze or close variant for edit reuse. Bridge should not mention oven temperature or minutes.
instructions.workflowNotes: Generate full song in Suno after operator edits; upload master to Recipe2Video; align excerpt markers to segment boundaries in assembly.

autoLyricsPrompt: Opening line: change "Write original English song lyrics" to "Write original 2-3 minutes English song lyrics".
Lyric style line: after "Keep the chorus reusable for a 45-90 second video edit", add ", but make a 2-3 minutes song".
Structure header: change "Structure:" to "Extend this structure to fit a 2-3 minutes song:"

qualityChecks: Title is first field in markdown mirror
Style of Music has no 2-3 minutes suffix in agent baseline
Auto Lyrics Prompt has no genre or production instructions
No artist imitation or brand names
Chorus hook is short and repeatable for 45-90s cut
Short version plan maps to segment arcs not tutorial steps
